tasks.check:services: deno check packages/service-core/mod.ts packages/mongo-service/mod.ts packages/pg-service/mod.ts packages/sqlite-service/mod.ts packages/studio/mod.ts packages/studio/component/studio.tsx
tasks.test:services: deno test -A --no-check packages/service-core/tests/ packages/mongo-service/tests/ packages/pg-service/tests/ packages/sqlite-service/tests/ packages/studio/tests/
tasks.test: deno test -A --no-check packages/howl/tests/ packages/howl-init/tests/ packages/howl-vue/tests/ packages/howl-react/tests/
tasks.doc:lint: cd packages/howl && deno doc --lint core/mod.ts core/client.ts dev/mod.ts plugins/mod.ts api/mod.ts api/errors.ts api/cache/mod.ts core/middlewares/mod.ts core/middlewares/cors.ts core/middlewares/csrf.ts core/middlewares/csp.ts core/middlewares/trailing_slashes.ts core/middlewares/static_files.ts
tasks.doc:lint:services: cd packages/service-core && deno doc --lint mod.ts conformance/mod.ts; cd ../mongo-service && deno doc --lint mod.ts; cd ../pg-service && deno doc --lint mod.ts; cd ../sqlite-service && deno doc --lint mod.ts
